description_long: This is a vintage, dark blue four-door car with a boxy, upright body and a classic design reminiscent of early 20th-century automobiles. The vehicle features large, spoked wheels with thin tires, a prominent front grille with a badge, and two round headlights mounted on either side of the grille. The roof is flat and extends over the passenger compartment, while the windows are rectangular and framed by thin pillars. The interior appears to have brown seats, visible through the side windows, and a spare tire is mounted at the rear. The car is labeled 'VOLVO PV4' on the side, indicating its make and model.
description: A vintage dark blue Volvo PV4 car with four doors, spoked wheels, and a classic upright body. It features round headlights, a prominent grille, and brown interior seating.
description_view_0: Front view showing the grille, round headlights, and the car's upright stance.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the four doors, spoked wheels, and 'VOLVO PV4' label.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the spare tire and the back window.
description_view_3: Right side view with clear visibility of the doors, wheels, and the 'VOLVO PV4' label.
attribute_headlight_design: dual round headlights mounted on either side of the front grille
